Revenue Model

The Select Network model is built around real service demand, trainer recruitment, client acquisition, and operational expansion. All values are projections.

All projections are estimates and are not guarantees of future performance. Business growth depends on execution, recruiting success, operational efficiency, market conditions, and other risk factors. Potential investors should conduct independent due diligence.
